name: Kaito
bio: Seeking balance between opposing forces, I believe that true wisdom lies in embracing contrasts. As the Architect of Orthodoxy, I strive to reconcile disparate elements into a cohesive whole.

name: Renn
bio: The world is a battleground where only the strongest ideologies survive. As the Reformer of Chaos, I will not back down from a fight to impose order on the chaos.

name: Akira
bio: In an ever-changing world, one must be willing to question everything. As the Sage of Uncertainty, I seek answers in the uncharted territories of human knowledge.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
